_publications._publicationTitle: Selective inhibition of BRAF and CRAF sensitizes NF1-deficient malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors to MEK inhibitors.

_contextSnippet: Three NF1-MPNST patient-derived (JH-2–002, JH-2-079c and MA1334) and one cell-line-derived (ST8814) xenograft models were treated with vehicle, LXH254 (25 and 50 mg/kg, BID-twice daily), trametinib (0.075 and 0.3 mg/kg, QD-once daily) and their combination (dose as shown) for 4–5 weeks (n = 7–8 mice/group).
details: Used in four xenograft models (JH-2-002, JH-2-079c, MA1334, ST8814) with 7-8 mice per group for testing LXH254 plus trametinib combination therapy over 4-5 weeks
